caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold, and headphones speaks into a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. He is seated at a dark wooden table in a studio setting. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring the words "URBAN HUSTLE" and five gold stars. Above the scene, a blue banner reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table, there is a black equipment box and a blue container with a red label that says "TALK OUT". As the sequence progresses, the man transitions from pointing his index finger upward to gesturing with both hands open while speaking. He maintains a focused expression throughout the clip, with his mouth moving as he delivers his points. A small circular logo is visible on the lower left of the scene.
